# Website Project Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type: React website using Vite

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Ran npx create-vite@latest . --template react

- [x] Customize the Project
	Skipped for Hello World project

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed via npm

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	Optional for dev server

- [x] Launch the Project
	Dev server started on http://localhost:5173/

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md exists and is up to date
